creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
Is the actively developed version of OpenHantek, specifically targetting the 6022BE / BL.

https://github.com/OpenHantek/OpenHantek6022/

This port is based off of Yuri's work on misc/openhantek. Since both binaries have the same name, conflicts are set in this port and it adds one to misc/openhantek for this port.
